# OrcaWave Results

Results are written to the OrcaWave output file and can be imported into OrcaFlex.

## RAO Output

Response amplitude operators are output in the [RAO file format](RAOFormat.htm).

| DOF | Period (s) | Heading (deg) | Amplitude | Phase (deg) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Surge | 10.0 | 0 | 0.95 | -5.2 |
| Heave | 10.0 | 0 | 0.98 | -12.4 |

## Export

See [exporting RAOs](ExportRAO.htm) for instructions on exporting to OrcaFlex.
